stories.story: As a Sales Executive, I want to create new lead records, so that I can capture potential customer information.
As a Sales Executive, I want to view and search for existing leads, so that I can access prospect information quickly.
As a Sales Executive, I want to update lead details, so that I can maintain accurate and current information for prospects.
As a Sales Executive, I want to qualify leads, so that I can identify promising prospects for further engagement.
As a Sales Executive, I want to convert qualified leads into customers, so that I can track successful sales and progress them in the system.
As a CRM System, I want to automatically identify newly created customers, so that I can initiate onboarding workflows.
As a CRM System, I want to send a personalized welcome email to new customers upon creation, so that they feel valued and informed.
As a Sales Manager, I want to customize the content of the welcome email template, so that messaging aligns with marketing strategies.
As a Sales Manager, I want to view a dashboard of overall sales performance, so that I can monitor team effectiveness at a glance.
As a Sales Manager, I want to generate individual sales executive performance reports, so that I can evaluate and coach my team members.
As a Sales Manager, I want to view sales pipeline reports, so that I can forecast future sales and identify potential bottlenecks.
As a Sales Manager, I want to view customer churn rate metrics, so that I can understand the rate at which customers are leaving.
As a Sales Manager, I want to view customer retention rate metrics, so that I can assess our success in keeping customers over time.
As a Sales Manager, I want to view detailed reports on churned customers, so that I can analyze reasons for attrition and take preventative actions.
